meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve Project Stall (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Break the loop of unfinished projects. Use this advanced checklist to build passive income engines with Antigravity and Claude Code. Start shipping today.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing perfection and start building utility. By automating your MVP deployment via Antigravity and leveraging Claude Code for rapid iteration, you transform stalled ideas into revenue-generating assets. Focus on micro-SaaS models that solve specific, high-friction problems for businesses, ensuring your code works for you while you sleep.
content.intro:
You are staring at a graveyard of half-baked repositories. The 'Founder's Curse' isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of leverage. You have the vision, but your execution cycle is suffocating under the weight of manual maintenance and scope creep. The graveyard grows because you are building features, not income.

True freedom comes when your codebase acts as a silent employee. By shifting your focus from 'crafting the perfect app' to 'deploying automated value,' you break the cycle of stagnation. We are going to use high-velocity tools to turn your technical debt into a scalable, passive income machine.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a recurring pain point in a B2B niche that can be automated via API. Stop building generalized platforms; build surgical solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 50 recurring complaints in [Niche] subreddits and identify a SaaS opportunity that can be solved with a single LLM-integrated workflow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --topic 'B2B automation pain points in [Niche]'

steps.title: Architect for Zero-Touch Maintenance
steps.description: Structure your app to run on serverless infrastructure. If it requires manual intervention, it isn't passive income.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a serverless architecture diagram for a subscription-based AI utility, ensuring zero-touch deployment and automated billing integration.

steps.title: Rapid MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the core business logic in minutes, not days. Focus on the 'happy path' that delivers immediate value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the core business logic for an automated [Niche] utility app. Focus on high-throughput API handling and Stripe subscription events.

steps.title: Automated Value Delivery Loop
steps.description: Implement an automated workflow that processes user inputs and delivers results without your oversight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an event-driven loop that triggers AI processing based on user webhook inputs and updates the database asynchronously.

steps.title: Deployment and Monetization Hook
steps.description: Finalize the production build and integrate automated payment triggers to lock in the passive revenue stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script that pushes to Vercel/AWS and enables Stripe webhook listeners for automated user access management.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' problems; businesses pay for stability, not novelty.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your billing logic first; if the money flow breaks, the business dies.
Avoid database bloat by offloading non-critical logs to cold storage immediately.
Implement rate limiting on day one to prevent API cost spikes from destroying your margins.
If a feature takes more than 48 hours to ship, cut the scope in half. Perfection is the enemy of profit.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 90% of your time on distribution. Passive income only exists if you have customers using the utility. Run targeted ads or cold outreach to your specific niche.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint and the tools to stop being a developer and start being a founder. Stop letting your ideas die in the IDE and start building assets that pay you back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
